'''Yara''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in [[Kyp's Dozen]] at the time they attacked the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[shipwomb]] at [[Sernpidal/Legends|Sernpidal]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]].
